text: There is a sterile quiet here, the kind that urges reflection. The walls are marked with signs of progress—R + D, research and development—reminding me that change is both inevitable and confounding. I feel a sense of distance from who I once was, amplified by the innovation around me. Am I evolving, or am I estranged from some intangible core? There is a melancholic curiosity; I am searching for answers, even as the world around me continues to shift and redefine itself.
